title: Relay admission request
description: The operator-authenticated Relay redeems a client-presented capability at the control plane before admitting a stream (doc 34 B2 §보안 제약 #5). The nonce is the single-use secret; audience is the stream the Relay binds the grant to; organizationId scopes the redemption to the correct tenant (RLS). No plaintext, no tokens cross here.
